name: grass hut
hints: A simple grass hut with an old box inside. Examine and open the box.
OPEN BOX to see what is inside. GET BOX to take it. It may contain useful items.
OPEN BOX or EXAM BOX to find contents. Go EAST to return to the island exterior.
notes: Grass hut on the small island containing an old box. Open it to find useful items. East returns to the island exterior (room 14).
